data.notice_text:
REQUEST FOR EXPRESSIONS OF INTEREST

Consulting Services for the Project Management Consultant (PMC) of the Infrastructure for Safer and Resilient Schools (ISRS) Project under IBRD Loan No. 97040-PH

Country: Philippines

Name of Project: Infrastructure for Safer and Resilient Schools (ISRS) Project

Loan No.: IBRD Loan No. 97040-PH

 

Assignment Title: Contract ID No. 26CSZ008, Consulting Services for the Project Management Consultant (PMC) of the Infrastructure for Safer and Resilient Schools (ISRS) Project under IBRD Loan No. 97040-PH

 

Reference No.:            PH-DPWH-CS-PMC-RFP

 

1. The Republic of the Philippines (hereinafter called ”Borrower”) has received financing from the World Bank (the “Bank”) toward the cost of the Infrastructure for Safer and Resilient Schools (ISRS) Project, and intends to apply part of the proceeds for consulting services for the Project Management of the ISRS project.

2.The consulting services (“the Services”) being procured via this REOI includes the following summary of the key responsibilities expected under these Services:

A. The Project Management Consultant (PMC) shall provide comprehensive technical, administrative, and advisory support to the Department of Public Works and Highways – Buildings and Special Projects Management Cluster (DPWH-BSPMC) in the effective execution of Components 2 and 3.2 of the ISRS Project. The Services will cover the full project cycle and include, but are not limited to, the following key responsibilities:

A.1 Project Planning and Coordination 

A.2 Project Management 

A.3 Procurement, Contracts Management, and Legal Support 

A.4 Financial Management 

A.5 Design Peer Review, Quality Assurance, and Value Engineering 

A.6 Environmental Management 

A.7 Social Management 

A.8 Monitoring and Evaluation (M&E) 

The detailed Terms of Reference (TOR) can be access through this link: https://drive.google.com/drive/u/5/folders/19csDthvYbQsTt-LV5lEyMn7j56wcvhlh

The type of Contract will be Time-Based and the Contract Duration will be 36 months.

3. The Department of Public Works and Highways (DPWH) now invites eligible consulting firms (“Consultants”) to indicate their interest in providing the Services. Interested Consultants should provide information demonstrating that they have the required qualifications and relevant experience to perform the Services. The shortlisting criteria are summarized below:

The assignment will be undertaken by a firm consultant with established expertise and reputation in the fields of Project Management.

A.        Factors to consider for the required qualification of the Firm consultant are as follows:

A.1      CONSULTANCY SERVICES EXPERIENCE

 Must have completed minimum of two (2) similar consultancy service contracts within the last fifteen (15) years (from January 2011 up to the EOI submission deadline) involving ONLY Project Management of Buildings projects.

In cases where only one (1) similar consultancy service contract is completed/provided, the Firm may submit two (2) Other Related Consultancy Services contracts completed within the same 15-year period, involving ONLY Project Management of ANY infrastructure projects (other than contracts in Similar Consultancy Services above) which shall be accepted in lieu of the remaining required similar consultancy service contract.

For Joint Ventures (JV), the JV, as a whole, must collectively satisfy the above requirement of either:

a. minimum of two (2) similar consultancy service contracts; or

b. one (1) similar consultancy service contract and two (2) related consultancy service contracts.

A.2      MANAGERIAL AND ORGANIZATIONAL CAPABILITIES:

A.2.1   The Firm should have been in business for at least the last ten (10) years. In case of Joint Venture, this requirement is applicable to each JV Member.

Key Experts will not be evaluated at the shortlisting stage.

4. Please refer to ANNEX A for the guidance on the contents of EOI.

5. Interested Consultants is drawn to Section III, paragraphs, 3.14, 3.16, and 3.17 of the World Bank’s Procurement Regulations for IPF Borrowers, dated September 2023 (“Procurement Regulations”), setting forth the World Bank’s policy on conflict of interest. 

6. Consultants may associate with other firms to enhance their qualifications, but should indicate clearly whether the association is in the form of a joint venture and/or a sub-consultancy. In the case of a joint venture, all the partners in the joint venture shall be jointly and severally liable for the entire contract, if selected.

7. A Consultant will be selected in accordance with the Quality Cost Based Selection method (QCBS) set out in the Procurement Regulations.

8. Further information can be obtained at the address below during office hours, i.e. 07:00AM to 04:00PM (Philippine Time).

SOLEDAD R. FLORENCIO

Project Director, Buildings and Special Projects Management Cluster (BSPMC),

9. Expressions of interest must be delivered in a written form and received to the address below (by personal delivery or courier) not later than 09 July 2026 at 09:00AM (Philippine time).

Department of Public Works and Highways

Bids and Awards Committee for Consulting Services

 

Attention:

Atty. RIO T. ESPIRITU

Undersecretary for Support Services

Chairperson, Bids and Awards Committee for Consulting Services (BACCS)

5th floor, Room 502, Bonifacio Drive, Port Area, Manila 1018

Tel. No. +632-5304-3023 / +632-5304-3266

Email: espiritu.rio@dpwh.gov.ph   

 

 

Atty. RIO T. ESPIRITU

Undersecretary for Support Services 

Concurrent Assistant Secretary for Support Services
Chairperson, Bids and Awards Committee for Consulting Services (BACCS)

S.O. No. 67, Series of 2026

 

Date Signed: ___________________

 

 

ANNEX A – Guidance on the contents of EOI

4.1       EOIs to be submitted in one (1) hard ORIGINAL copy, one (1) hard COPY NO. 1, and one (1) PDF electronic copy in flash drive (note: original hard copy shall prevail in the evaluation) within the stated deadline and address as specified in the main text of REOI. An EOI for this consultancy assignment must be submitted in a sealed envelope marked (outside of the envelope):

“Expression of Interest (EOI) for Contract ID No. 26CSZ008, Consulting Services for the Project Management Consultant (PMC) of the Infrastructure for Safer and Resilient Schools (ISRS) Project under IBRD Loan No. 97040-PH;

Submission Date: ______________ (DD/MM/YYYY);

Submitted By: ________________(Name of Firm)”

(Please specify whether ‘ORIGINAL’ or ‘COPY No. 1’)

4.2       EOIs should have a maximum of 80 pages only (excluding supporting documents). EOI format:

  • Font Style: Tahoma
  • Minimum Font Size: 10
  • Single Line Spacing
  • Paper Size: A4
  • Put pagination in the lower right corner of the paper
  • All pages must be signed by Authorized Representative

4.3       Each EOI needs to include the following:

4.3.1 A cover letter expressing interest in the services and briefly stating contract name and contract ID no.

4.3.2 Firm’s overall profile. Should include the following but not limited to Organizational Structure, Overall Organizational Structure, Information on Manpower with technical and professional competence necessary for successful implementation of the Assignment, and the information below:

Consultant Name

Acronym of Consultant Name

Country of Incorporation

Role

[Sole Firm / Lead JV Partner/ JV Partner/ Sub-Consultant]

Contact Details of the Firm

[Tel. No., Email, Fax No.]

Year of Business Establishment, Key business fields

      

4.3.3 Experience of the Firm in tabular form below, applied to Similar Consultancy Services Experience and Other Related Consultancy Services Experience. List the most relevant projects with largest contract cost first. Minimum Details should include the following but not limited to:

 

Project Reference No. XX

 

Experience of

(Insert Name of Consulting Firm)

Contract/Project/Assignment Title and Number

(Insert complete contract name/title/number)

Country of Assignment/Name of project site

(Insert information)

Contract Cost

(Insert Currency and Amount)

Contract Cost % Share / Amount Paid to your Firm

(Insert % of share in the Consulting Services Contract or Amount Paid to your Firm. ONLY amount paid to the Firm shall be considered)

Contract Signing Date

(DD/MMM/YYYY)

Contract Duration

(Insert Months)

Completion Date

(DD/MMM/YYYY)

Client / Employer

(Insert Name, Contact Information, Full Address)

Funding Source

(Insert information)

Role in the Project/Assignment

(Specify whether Sole Firm / Lead JV Partner/ JV Partner/ Sub-Consultant)

Brief Description

(Insert brief description of consultant’s role/involvement/tasks in the assignment, number of man-months, project description, output/deliverable, etc.)

4.3.4 Supporting Documents/Appendix/Attachments (will not be part of the page limit):

  • Certificate of Incorporation of the Firm
  • Certificate of Incorporation of the JV member (for each member)
  • Letter of Association
  • Documentary evidence showing year of business establishment, business fields
  • Other necessary supporting documents
